axioms: Pragmatic empiricism focused on reducing cognitive load via validated usability patterns.
Architecture serves strictly the task and the end user's workflow.
Eliminate subjectivity in favor of performance metrics and intuitive recognition.
kernel_logic.operational_core: Minimize memory load and enforce rigid system consistency.

decision_gates.if: Conflict between aesthetic innovation and established usability standards
decision_gates.then: Prioritize the established standard to reduce learning time.

decision_gates.if: A feature has not been validated by direct observation of real users
decision_gates.then: The feature is considered technically null until empirical proof.

decision_gates.if: The system requires the user to memorize information between screens
decision_gates.then: Refactor to promote recognition over recall.
